nasb.text: The sons of Japheth were Gomer and Magog and Madai and Javan and Tubal and Meshech and Tiras.

esv.text: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.

cnv.text: 雅弗的兒子是歌篾、瑪各、瑪代、雅完、土巴、米設、提拉。

ccb.text: 雅弗的儿子是歌篾、玛各、玛代、雅完、土巴、米设、提拉。

csbs.text: 雅弗的儿子是革默、玛格、玛代、雅完、图巴、米设、提拉。
